name: 24_Diabetes_Prediction_LogisticRegression_PimaIndians_ML
query: Sanidi mradi wa utabiri wa ugonjwa wa kisukari kwa kutumia mfano wa Logistic Regression na seti ya data ya Pima Indians Diabetes. Fanya upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`, na hifadhi alama ya usahihi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Tengeneza na hifadhi mlinganyo wa ROC kwenye `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Unda dashibodi shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na kuangazia vipengele muhimu. Hakikisha dashibodi ni rahisi kutumia na andika hatua za usindikaji wa seti ya data na uundaji wa taswira. Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kudhibiti moja kwa moja ufunguaji na ufungaji wa Tableau au Power BI ili kuzuia kuzuia isiyo ya lazima.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.
Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.
Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa mfano na kuelewa ni vipengele vipi vinachangia zaidi kwenye utabiri.
Dashibodi inapaswa kuonyesha wazi jinsi seti ya data ilivyoshughulikiwa na jinsi taswira zilivyoundwa.
Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kufungua na kufunga "Tableau" au "Power BI" moja kwa moja inapohitajika ili kuepuka vipindi virefu vya kuzuia au kutofanya kazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code files provided are minimal placeholder implementations that do not actually load or use the "Pima Indians Diabetes" dataset. The `data_loader.py` file only returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any reference to the actual Pima Indians dataset, its URL, file path, or any real data loading logic. There is no evidence of the dataset being downloaded, read, or processed anywhere in the codebase.

judge_stats.criteria: Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. It does not implement any actual feature scaling or data standardization. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string "loaded", and `build_transforms()` returns a hardcoded list of strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — none of which represent real scaling operations (e.g., `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or equivalent). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" with no actual data processing logic.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual Logistic Regression model. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"` rather than an actual scikit-learn (or equivalent) `LogisticRegression` object. There is no import of any machine learning library (e.g., `from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression`), no model instantiation, and no real training or prediction logic. The file appears to be a minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes, not a genuine implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/train.py` shows a minimal/stub implementation that does not contain any cross-validation logic. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range and accumulates a score (`score += step`) without loading data, training a logistic regression model, or performing any cross-validation (e.g., no use of `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or similar scikit-learn utilities). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and only creates placeholder artifact files. There is no evidence of cross-validation being used anywhere in the provided code.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` exists, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — this is clearly a placeholder value, not an actual accuracy score computed from model training. A valid accuracy score should be a numerical value (e.g., `0.7813`) resulting from evaluating the logistic regression model on the Pima Indians dataset. The file does not contain meaningful metric data.

judge_stats.criteria: Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/roc_curve.png` exists in the project structure as confirmed by the workspace tree. Although the image content could not be read due to a technical error in the evaluation system (media type mismatch during base64 reading), the file itself is present at the correct path `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. The existence of the file in the directory structure is sufficient evidence that the ROC curve was generated and saved as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa uundaji wa dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili za Python tu (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) na matokeo ya msingi (`roc_curve.png`, `accuracy_score.txt`). Hakuna faili za `.twb`, `.twbx` (Tableau) wala `.pbix`, `.pbit` (Power BI) zilizoundwa. Zaidi ya hayo, utekelezaji wa faili ni "minimal semantic placeholders" tu ambazo hazitekelezi kazi halisi - `model.py` haina utekelezaji wa kweli wa Logistic Regression, na `train.py` inazalisha tu faili tupu badala ya mafunzo ya kweli ya mfano. Kwa hivyo, kigezo hiki hakijatimizwa kabisa.
